news.headline: Spain opens port to hantavirus-hit cruise ship as rare Andes strain confirmed
news.summary: A ⁠luxury cruise ship hit by a deadly ⁠hantavirus outbreak and marooned for days off the coast ⁠of Cabo Verde with close to 150 people on board was due to head to Spain, while South Africa confirmed it identified among the victims a strain of the virus that can – in rare cases – spread among humans.

news.headline: Trump orders military to pause effort to reopen the Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: The White House and the Pentagon touted the new mission dubbed “Project Freedom” on Tuesday, only for the president to abruptly halt it.

news.headline: Japan’s hikikomori recluses are growing old. So are their carers
news.summary:
Japan has long grappled with what to do about hikikomori – the social hermits who seal themselves off from the world, sometimes for years, retreating from all human contact.
